verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلنَّجْمِ إِذَا هَوَىٰ
verses.text: By the star when it falls!
Your companion has not gone astray, nor has he erred,
nor does he speak on a whim.
It is nothing but an inspiration inspired.
One harsh in power has taught him
– One full of strength! He stood poised,
while He was at the highest horizon,
then He drew near and came down.
He was two bow-lengths tall, or nearly.
And so He inspired His servant (with) what He inspired.
His heart did not lie about what it saw.
Will you dispute with him about what he sees?
Certainly he saw Him at a second descent,
by the Lote Tree of the Boundary,
near which is the Garden of the Refuge,
when (there) covered the Lote Tree what covered (it).
His sight did not turn aside, nor did it transgress.

verses.quran_arabic: لَقَدْ رَأَىٰ مِنْ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ
verses.text: Certainly he saw one of the greatest signs of his Lord.
Have you seen al-Lāt, and al-’Uzzā,
and Manāt, the third, the other?
Do you have male (offspring) while He has female?
Then that (would be) an unfair division!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌۭ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطَٰنٍ ۚ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ ۖ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
verses.text: They are only names which you have named, you and your fathers. God has not sent down any authority for it. They only follow conjecture and whatever they themselves desire – when certainly the guidance has come to them from their Lord.
Or will a person have whatever he longs for?
To God (belongs) the last and the first.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍۢ فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفَٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
verses.text: How many an angel there is in the heavens whose intercession is of no use at all, until God gives permission to whomever He pleases and approves.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ تَسْمِيَةَ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.text: Surely those who do not believe in the Hereafter indeed name the angels with the names of females.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْمٍ ۖ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ ۖ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ شَيْـًۭٔا
verses.text: But they have no knowledge about it. They only follow conjecture, and surely conjecture is of no use at all against the truth.

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.text: So turn away from the one who turns away from Our reminder and desires nothing but this present life.

verses.quran_arabic: ذَٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
verses.text: That is the extent of their knowledge. Surely your Lord – He knows who goes astray from His way, and He knows who is (rightly) guided.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسَٰٓـُٔوا۟ بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ بِٱلْحُسْنَى
verses.text: To God (belongs) whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth, so that He may repay those who do evil for what they have done, and repay those who do good with the best (reward).

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبَٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوَٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وَٰسِعُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ ۚ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِكُمْ إِذْ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِذْ أَنتُمْ أَجِنَّةٌۭ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمْ ۖ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ ۖ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
verses.text: Those who avoid great sins and immoral deeds, except for inadvertent ones – surely your Lord is embracing in forgiveness. He knows about you, when He produced you from the earth, and when you were (still) embryos in the bellies of your mothers. So do not claim purity for yourselves. He knows the one who guards (himself).
Do you see the one who turns away,
and gives little, and (then) grudgingly?
Is knowledge of the unseen in his keeping, and so he sees (it)?

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ لَمْ يُنَبَّأْ بِمَا فِى صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
verses.text: Or has he not been informed about what is in the pages of Moses
and Abraham, who paid (his debt) in full?
– That no one bearing a burden bears the burden of another;

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسَٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
verses.text: and that a person will receive only what he (himself) strives for;
and that his striving will be seen,
(and) then he will be paid for it with the fullest payment;
and that to your Lord is the (ultimate) goal;
and that He causes laughter and causes weeping;
and that He causes death and gives life;
and that He created pairs, the male and the female,
from a drop, when it is emitted;
and that the second growth (depends) on Him;
and that He enriches (people) and gives wealth;
and that He is the Lord of Sirius;
and that He destroyed ‘Ād of old,
and Thamūd – He did not spare (them)

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍۢ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ هُمْ أَظْلَمَ وَأَطْغَىٰ
verses.text: – or the people of Noah before (them) – surely they were – they (were) evil and insolent transgressor(s) –
and the overturned (cities) He overthrew,
when (there) covered them what covered (them).
So which of the blessings of your Lord will you dispute?
This (man) is a warner, of the warners of old.
The impending (Hour) is impending!

verses.quran_arabic: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
verses.text: There is no one to remove it, other than God.
Are you amazed at this proclamation?
And do you laugh and not weep,
while you amuse yourselves?
Prostrate yourselves before God and serve (Him)!
